title: Support - App, user is logged during install process, correct data
scenario: Support > App section in Poly Studio Mobile app displays correct app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, and last connection info after onboarding login
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Complete the onboarding flow and log in with valid credentials.
3. Tap the hamburger menu (☰) in the top-left corner of the Home screen.
5. Observe the "App" section on the Support screen.
expected: The App section displays the following correct data: app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, and last connection info.
